description.zh: Permission Engine 的规则匹配、路径沙箱验证和环境变量清洗
description.en: Permission Engine's rule matching, path sandbox validation, and environment variable sanitization

content.zh:
加载权限规则:
  src/** → allow (FileRead/Edit)
  node_modules/** → deny (FileEdit)
  .env* → deny (FileRead)
  ~/** → ask (FileRead)
content.en:
Load permission rules:
  src/** → allow (FileRead/Edit)
  node_modules/** → deny (FileEdit)
  .env* → deny (FileRead)
  ~/** → ask (FileRead)

annotation.zh: 权限规则用 glob 模式定义
annotation.en: Permission rules defined using glob patterns

annotation.zh: 模型请求读取源码文件
annotation.en: Model requests to read source file

content.zh:
权限检查:
  path: src/auth.ts
  tool: FileRead
  匹配规则: src/** → allow
  结果: ✓ 允许
content.en:
Permission check:
  path: src/auth.ts
  tool: FileRead
  Matched rule: src/** → allow
  Result: ✓ Allow

annotation.zh: 路径在 src/ 下，匹配 allow 规则
annotation.en: Path under src/, matches allow rule

content.zh:
权限检查:
  path: node_modules/lodash/index.js
  tool: FileEdit
  匹配规则: node_modules/** → deny
  结果: ✗ 拒绝!
content.en:
Permission check:
  path: node_modules/lodash/index.js
  tool: FileEdit
  Matched rule: node_modules/** → deny
  Result: ✗ Deny!

annotation.zh: 模型尝试读取环境变量文件
annotation.en: Model attempts to read environment file

content.zh:
权限检查:
  path: .env.local
  tool: FileRead
  匹配规则: .env* → deny
  结果: ✗ 拒绝! (防止密钥泄露)
content.en:
Permission check:
  path: .env.local
  tool: FileRead
  Matched rule: .env* → deny
  Result: ✗ Deny! (Prevent key leakage)

annotation.zh: 环境变量文件包含敏感信息，禁止读取
annotation.en: Environment files contain sensitive info, reading forbidden

content.zh:
子进程环境清洗:
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY → 已删除
  DATABASE_URL → 已删除
  AWS_SECRET_KEY → 已删除
  PATH → 保留
  HOME → 保留
content.en:
Subprocess environment sanitization:
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY → Removed
  DATABASE_URL → Removed
  AWS_SECRET_KEY → Removed
  PATH → Kept
  HOME → Kept

annotation.zh: 启动子进程前清除敏感环境变量
annotation.en: Clear sensitive env vars before starting subprocess
